# Perplexity API Features & Announcements

## February 2026
- **Agent API** - General availability launched with production guidance and OpenAI-compatibility
- **Embeddings API** - Released with guides for standard/contextualized embeddings and semantic search

## December 2025
- **Media Classifier** - Automatically detects visual content needs and includes relevant images/videos in responses
- **Search API Enhancements** - New `max_tokens` parameter for controlling extracted tokens per page; `last_updated_filter` for content freshness; Vercel AI SDK compatibility
- **sonar-reasoning model deprecated** (December 15, 2025); migration path to `sonar-reasoning-pro`

## November 2025
- **Pro Search** - "Multi-step reasoning through intelligent tool orchestration" with automated tool usage and real-time thought streaming
- **MCP Server One-Click Installation** - Auto-configuration support for Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code
- Four MCP tools: `perplexity_search`, `perplexity_ask`, `perplexity_research`, `perplexity_reason`

## October 2025
- **Official Perplexity SDKs** - Python (`perplexityai`) and TypeScript (`@perplexity-ai/perplexity_ai`) SDKs with type-safe API access and streaming support
- **Interactive Search API Playground** - Test queries without API key requirement at https://console.perplexity.ai
- **New Search Capabilities** - `language_preference` parameter; `search_domain_filter` for targeted results

## September 2025
- **File Attachments Support** - Document upload and analysis for PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, RTF formats
- **Standalone Search API** - Direct access to search results without LLM processing
- **API Key Rotation** - Comprehensive system with seamless rotation, automation, and audit trails

## July 2025
- **Detailed Cost Information** - API responses now include input/output token costs and per-request charges
- **SEC Filings Filter** - Search specifically within SEC regulatory documents and filings

## June 2025
- **Enhanced Date Range Filtering** - `latest_updated` field for tracking webpage modifications
- **Academic Filter** - Prioritize peer-reviewed papers and scholarly sources via `search_mode: "academic"`

## May 2025
- **Reasoning Effort Parameter** - Control computational effort ("low", "medium", "high") for Sonar Deep Research
- **Asynchronous API** - Dedicated endpoints for research-intensive tasks with 7-day result retention
- **search_results Field** - Enhanced API responses providing titles, URLs, and publication dates

## April 2025
- **API Portal** - Organization management, API key handling, usage insights
- **Location Filtering** - Narrow search results by user location
- **Image Uploads** - Multimodal image support for Sonar
- **Date Range Filtering** - Retrieve results from specific timeframes
- **All Features Democratized** - Removed tier-based feature gating across entire user base

## March 2025
- **Structured Outputs** - JSON formatting available to all users (previously tier-restricted)
- **Three New Search Modes** - "High", "Medium", "Low" depth options across Sonar models

## January 2025
- **Sonar & Sonar Pro Models** - New cost-effective search-based APIs with built-in citations

## Last Fetched
2026-04-12 - No new entries detected beyond what was previously cached.
